sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54547" key="katamni/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμνίω</orth>, <sense id="n54547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατεσθίω</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καταμιεῖ</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
